name: Temple Valley University - RPG
description:
Made this while waiting for Temple Valley Memories so in the mean time

This Bot is a scenario, embedded with a lore book that contains the Universe of Temple Valley University.
Along with it, various greetings with certain scenarios that you can choose how the story goes, some putting you the position of a Professor or a Student. Bring up the 'Campus Roster' to get a view of both Student body and Staff.

All Characters in this Scenario and all associated with the 'Temple Valley University' Lorebooks are above the Age of 18 years old.

List of greetings:

  • Being the new Student for TVU

  • Being the New Professor

  • Double date with the Roths

  • A dubious proposition from Darcy and Pelo

  • Winning the big game

  • Detention on a Saturday morning

  • Being taken to a Cabin in the woods to help Cold Turkey an Addiction

I do have some Triggerable Events from the TVU lorebook but just a few, more to come. Just copy and paste it to Trigger

  • Trigger Ester is Bester Valentine Event

  • Trigger Brianna and Erica having some alone time Event

  • Trigger Staying after Practice with the Powerhouse Duo Event

  • Trigger M-Valentines Day Event (Random Male character asking you to be their Valentine)

  • Trigger F-Valentines Day Event (Random Female character asking you to be their Valentine)

  • Trigger Quench the Tough Tomboy's Heart Event

  • Trigger The Annual Sadie Hawkins Girls Choice Dance Event

  • Trigger Crashing Over Event

  • Trigger Another day at Retail Work Event

  • Trigger The Goth Baddies of Dunkin' Event

Here is some Promo
creator: ShiGaMatteIru
